name: multi-source-search-plugin
description: Requires python3, and AISA_API_KEY. Native-first ClawHub plugin for `multi-source-search`. Ships the packaged AIsa skill with an `openclaw.plugin.json` manifest and a Claude-compatible bundle fallback. Multi-source intelligent search for agents. Retrieval across web, scholar, Tavily, and Perplexity Sonar models. Use when: the user needs web search, research, source discovery, or content extraction.
